ddls:
CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., INFY for Infosys) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NSE, BSE) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering */,
  "is_etf" INTEGER /* Indicates if the symbol is an ETF */,
  "is_index" INTEGER /* Indicates if the symbol is an index */,
  "company_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the company */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount of the company */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series (e.g., EQ for Equity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the series is currently active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the series started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the series ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_until" TEXT /* Date until which the account is locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, volume analysis) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been shared */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date when the report was last viewed */,
  "last_downloaded" TEXT /* Date when the report was last downloaded */,
  "last_shared" TEXT /* Date when the report was last shared */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data included in the report (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., NSE, BSE, Yahoo Finance) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value (e.g., USD, shares) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "is_aggregated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is aggregated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should trigger */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert should remain active */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel for sending the alert (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "alert_recipients" TEXT /* Recipients of the alert (e.g., email addresses, phone numbers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator (e.g., GDP Growth Rate, Inflation Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., economic, financial) */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the indicator (e.g., daily, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "indicator_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source where the indicator data is published */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the indicator value (e.g., percentage, dollars) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "is_seasonally_adjusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the indicator is seasonally adjusted */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., macroeconomic, financial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
